title: CitationFaithfulnessCase
description: One case in the citation-faithfulness eval suite. The runner asserts that the claim's cited span exists in the cited target (R-EXT-004). A case is `expected_pass=false` when the seed represents a known-bad citation we want the verifier to catch.

claim.description: The claim language as it would appear in a brief.

text.description: The full target text the verifier sees. Span_text must (or must not) appear here per expected_pass.

span_text.description: The verbatim span the citation claims to back the claim with.

expected_pass.description: true when the span genuinely supports the claim; false when this is a seeded bad citation we want the verifier to reject.
